insight.title: How did you know the play button?
insight.subtitle: The triangle is the universal play symbol
insight.playTitle: The play triangle has not changed for 60 years
insight.playDesc: The right-pointing triangle remains universally understood as play.
insight.thumbnailDesc: Visual previews communicate content without text.
insight.progressDesc: The seek bar pattern is standard in media players worldwide.

insight.title: How did you find the share button?
insight.subtitle: Share icons visualize connection
insight.shareTitle: Share icon shape tells its meaning
insight.shareDesc: Connected dots or upward arrows visualize sending outward.
insight.actionTitle: Action buttons are arranged in a row
insight.actionDesc: Like, share, save arranged horizontally is a standard pattern.
insight.modalDesc: The bottom sheet for sharing is an OS standard component.

insight.title: How did you find the save button?
insight.subtitle: Flag symbols mean save universally
insight.saveDesc: Flags and ribbons consistently mean hold this item.
insight.feedbackDesc: Icons changing color show the registration state transition.
insight.listDesc: Watch later lists are common across streaming platforms.

insight.title: How did you find the subtitle setting?
insight.subtitle: Settings hide behind the three dots menu
insight.menuTitle: Three dots is the gateway to more features
insight.menuDesc: Three dots indicate more features exist including subtitles.
insight.ccTitle: CC is an international subtitle symbol
insight.ccDesc: CC box is an international standard symbol for subtitles.
insight.settingsDesc: Toggle switches communicate state through color and position.
